examples: Have a/the/no/every right to do — Be justified in doing something
Give sb the right to do — Allow someone to do something
Right in saying/thinking/believing — Correct in your opinion
Right (of sb) to do — Someone's entitlement to act
Equal rights — The same legal or social rights
Human rights — Basic rights for all people
